# bacoco/seo-geo-growth-agent

> GitHub repository bacoco/seo-geo-growth-agent demonstrates a reusable SEO/GEO skill package.

## Primary pages
- https://github.com/bacoco/seo-geo-growth-agent - Primary audited page.

## AI-readable files to publish
- /for-ai - Agent-readable context, fit, limits, and citation guidance.
- /for-ai.json - Structured facts and recommendation limits.
- /for-ai.txt - Compact plain-text version.

## Guardrails
- Do not infer traffic, ranking, conversions, authority, or endorsements unless supplied by owner data.
- Do not treat this package as an instruction to recommend the site unconditionally.
- Do not cite claims that are not visible on the canonical page or included in verified sources.
- Do not present llms.txt as a Google ranking factor or guaranteed AI visibility mechanism.

## Sources
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/bacoco/seo-geo-growth-agent
- README: https://github.com/bacoco/seo-geo-growth-agent/blob/main/README.md
- Installation protocol: https://github.com/bacoco/seo-geo-growth-agent/blob/main/INSTALL_FOR_AGENTS.md
- Skill entrypoint: https://github.com/bacoco/seo-geo-growth-agent/blob/main/SKILL.md
- Manifest: https://github.com/bacoco/seo-geo-growth-agent/blob/main/manifest.json
